description_long: This sculpture features a life-sized human figure standing solemnly on a multi-tiered stone platform, flanked by two large, abstract, wing-like stone forms that curve upward and inward behind the figure. The central figure appears to be male, with hands clasped behind his back, and is rendered in a realistic style. The base consists of several wide, rectangular steps, with a section of green, grass-like texture on one side, suggesting a blend of natural and constructed elements. The stone wings are highly textured and dynamic, contrasting with the smooth, geometric lines of the platform. An inscription is visible on the front face of the base, adding a commemorative or dedicatory element. The overall composition conveys a sense of monumentality and reverence, likely intended as a public memorial or tribute.
description: A monumental stone sculpture of a standing human figure framed by dramatic, abstract stone wings on a stepped platform with a grassy section. The design combines realistic and abstract elements, with an inscription on the front base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the human figure facing forward, flanked by the dramatic stone wings and the inscription on the base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the depth of the wing structures, and the stepped platform with the grassy area extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure and the full curvature of the stone wings, with the grassy section occupying much of the visible base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the figure, the layered stone wings, and the transition between the stone steps and grassy area.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with abstract stone wings
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a stepped stone platform with a grassy section, suggesting an outdoor public or park setting.
